title: rhoeidium microphyllum
intro: Rhoeidium microphyllum, also known as the lesser nettle or small nettle, is a plant species that belongs to the family Urticaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihistaminic effects. The health benefits of Rhoeidium microphyllum include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with allergies and skin irritations. Rhoeidium microphyllum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in topical applications such as creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
